case_title: CITI PROPERTIES I, LLC VS. NOE ANDRADE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITI PROPERTIES I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDRADE, JULIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 EDDY STREET, #64, IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRADE, JULIO
